title: Refresh active doc surface to harness 4.1.0 (tool-ownership author-vs-distribute rule)
perceive: Harness master graduated to 4.1.0. Managed templates now carry the tool-ownership (author-vs-distribute) rule in templates/spoke/{AGENTS,CLAUDE}.md, claude/CLAUDE.md, codex/AGENTS.md, commands/wai-rules.md. Your live hooks were just refreshed to 4.1.0 by basher restore --live-hooks. Your active doc surface may still be pre.22.
execute: 1. On spin-up, pull-on-spin-up self-maintains managed/ -> confirm your managed/ is at 4.1.0.
2. Sync your active doc surface (root CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .claude/commands/wai-rules.md) from managed 4.1.0 via your normal advisor sync (e.g. /wai-advisor or wai-health).
3. Preserve any spoke-local sections; this rule is additive (tool-ownership anti-pattern + author-vs-distribute lane).
verify: Active CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/wai-rules.md contain the tool-ownership author-vs-distribute rule; managed/ MANIFEST harness_version == 4.1.0.
acceptance_criteria: active doc surface carries tool-ownership rule
notes: Hook bodies already deployed by basher. This lug covers the doc surface only (basher does not push existing spokes' CLAUDE.md per cross-spoke sovereignty). No action needed if your advisor already auto-synced.
